rationale: Educ. Code §29.0822 governs optional flexible school day programs and attendance-based funding calculations. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b), so increasing the exemption amount creates no direct conflict.
quote: The commissioner shall calculate average daily attendance for students served under this section.
_note: No direct or indirect textual conflict between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute's operative provisions.
